title: globba leucantha var. leucantha
intro: Globba leucantha var. leucantha, also known as the white globba, is a type of plant that belongs to the Zingiberaceae family, native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, cold, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Globba leucantha var. leucantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
